desc: Replace inferPattern() with renderPattern() — enriched execution prompts in brief.pattern for spawned agents

render-pattern.desc: Replace inferPattern() with renderPattern() in src/runtime/brief.ts. Interpolates description, produces, consumes, position, mode into a concrete 7-line execution prompt. Execute mode: TASK/PRODUCE/CONSUME/SCOPE/VERIFY/BLOCKED/MODE. Plan mode: TASK/DECOMPOSE/POSITION/OUTPUT/VERIFY. Uses only data already in scope (spec, g.desc, position). No new imports.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: renderPattern produces a self-contained execution prompt that constrains spawned agents without requiring them to interpret structured JSON

sync-lib-brief.desc: Replace inferPattern() with renderPattern() in src/lib/brief.ts to match runtime/brief.ts. Same function, same output. The lib copy is the agent-facing API (roadmap/agent entry point).

test-pattern.desc: Test renderPattern: execute mode contains TASK/PRODUCE/CONSUME/SCOPE/VERIFY lines with actual node data interpolated. Plan mode contains DECOMPOSE. Verify pattern changes when produces/consumes/description change. Verify no data loss vs old inferPattern (all old patterns still matchable as substrings).
